name: Guangdong Hoshion Aluminium Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Hoshion Aluminium Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells industrial aluminum profiles. The company offers consumer electronics, such as OPC and driven rollers for copier printers; power bank housing products; extrusion profiles for mobile phones; aluminum for TV frames; electronic products extrusion materials; arm of computer hard disc; seamless pipes for lens; and photographic equipment. It also provides automobile anti-collision beams; automobile slide rail for skylight; high precision large sectional rectangle pipes; colied pipesinner thread pipes; and forging parts. In addition, the company offers seamless pipes for baseball bars; kitchen and bathroom components; aluminum used baby trolley; aluminum for bicycle; extrusion profiles for flashlight and vacuum products; aluminum used lighting and snow shoes; electric heating tubes; and conditioner frames. Guangdong Hoshion Aluminium Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Zhongshan, China.
